atlas_signature: High L_D, low H_D, and positive ΔH_D
dataset_diagnosis: High-pass components may act as noise
diagnostic_guidance: Remove, downweight, gate, or regularize high-pass blocks

dataset_diagnosis: Raw features are insufficient; class geometry is complex
diagnostic_guidance: Preserve graph-derived signals and improve class-specific subspace modeling

dataset_diagnosis: Correct nodes rely on high-pass structure
diagnostic_guidance: Preserve or adaptively gate high-pass differences rather than removing them globally
Strengthen the discriminative head or improve PCA–Ridge boundary fusion

dataset_diagnosis: Both geometry and boundary fail on many nodes
diagnostic_guidance: Investigate new signal blocks, hard-node treatment, uncertainty handling, or graph rewiring

dataset_diagnosis: Raw features carry strong class information
diagnostic_guidance: Use raw-preserving skip design, weak propagation, or propagation gating
